description: Add a format-neutral normalized input contract and optional Croissant ML and Frictionless Data ingestion providers without coupling source parsers to VOI calculation kernels.

approval.evidence: User requested incorporation of the previously presented architecture and issue plan into the existing Conductor system, GitHub issues/sub-issues, and project.

gates.evidence: User approval recorded on 2026-07-23; issue #325 and native sub-issues #326-#333 created.

Commit 67e079e and GitHub issues #325-#333 incorporate versioned binding profiles, materialization receipts, governance metadata, controlled provider discovery, and data-quality reporting; focused tests, harness, setup validation, and Vale passed.
Implementation has not started; plan phases 1-7 remain pending.
Required after functional implementation and before track completion.
